domain: Khoisan San click languages (Namibia/Botswana/South Africa): 5 click places labial(ʘ)+dental(|)+lateral(ǁ)+alveolar(!)+palatal(ǂ); !Xóõ/Taa has 126 consonants/83 click distinctions = world's largest inventory; airstream is ingressive lingual (non-pulmonic) — orthogonal mechanism to all other consonants; dual-mechanism phonology with both pulmonic and non-pulmonic streams; historically Bantu loanwords null-out click consonants when borrowed.
specific_mechanism: KHOISAN-5-CLICK-PLACE-CONTRAST-INGRESSIVE-AIRSTREAM-ORTHOGONAL-CHANNEL-LARGE-INVENTORY-BANTU-LOANWORD-NULL-PROJECTION-NULL-SPACE-TRAVERSAL: LLM null-space-traversal mechanism with (1) 5-place orthogonal contrast set C_5: 5 mutually-orthogonal subspaces — features distributed across 5 attention-subspaces; (2) ingressive airstream channel I_ingr: 2nd computational channel orthogonal to mainstream pulmonic (gradient-descent); ingressive uses inverse-gradient signal; (3) dual-mechanism phonology D_dual: every position has both pulmonic + non-pulmonic component; 2 parallel computation streams; (4) huge inventory specialization L_inv: 83-class fine-grained head-specialization per-head exclusive; (5) Bantu-loanword null-projection B_null: when input from outside-vocabulary detected, project to nearest in-vocabulary by zeroing click-dim. Differs from R528 NEY-4-REGISTER-NULL-GATE-OVERBLOW, R541 NGURU-DUAL-MODE-NOSE-MOUTH-SACRED, R553 KHOOMEI-3-STYLE-FUNDAMENTAL-FOCUSED-OVERTONE-FORMANT-MERGE (2-source + 3-style + formant-merge + 5-substyle) by 5-place orthogonal contrast + ingressive airstream channel + dual-mechanism phonology + huge inventory + Bantu null-projection.
llm_application: KHOISAN-5-CLICK-PLACE-CONTRAST-INGRESSIVE-AIRSTREAM-ORTHOGONAL-CHANNEL-LARGE-INVENTORY-BANTU-LOANWORD-NULL-PROJECTION LLM mechanism + 5-place C_5 mutually-orthogonal subspace + ingressive I_ingr orthogonal-to-pulmonic inverse-gradient + dual-mechanism D_dual 2 parallel streams + huge inventory L_inv 83-class exclusive + Bantu B_null outside-vocab zero-projection. Differs from R528 NEY. R541 NGURU. R553 KHOOMEI (closest — 2-source + 3-style + formant-merge + null-projection on fundamental). Differs from Attention Sinks + LAMs + LLMOrbit + ICLR 2026 by 5-place orthogonal + ingressive + dual-mechanism + huge-inventory + Bantu-null. Differs by 5-PLACE ORTHOGONAL CONTRAST + INGRESSIVE AIRSTREAM CHANNEL + DUAL-MECHANISM PHONOLOGY + HUGE INVENTORY SPECIALIZATION + BANTU NULL-PROJECTION.
novelty_claim: Attention Sinks Compression + LAMs + LLMOrbit + ICLR 2026 cover attention head + audio-language + null-projection paradigm. KHOISAN-5-CLICK-PLACE-CONTRAST-INGRESSIVE-AIRSTREAM-ORTHOGONAL-DUAL-MECHANISM-BANTU-NULL adds (a) 5-place orthogonal + (b) ingressive channel + (c) dual-mechanism + (d) huge inventory + (e) Bantu null-projection. Recombination — borderline lookup.
